response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and distributed systems engineer, but his background heavily leans towards web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and DLang rather than the core requirements of this role. He lacks recent, substantial professional experience in C++ and STL, and his resume shows no exposure to industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA) or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) required for this position.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software development experience, including building high-performance distributed systems and microservices.
Strong familiarity with advantageous web technologies like Node.js, React, and TypeScript.
Demonstrated leadership, engineering craftsmanship, and architectural skills, including founding an open-source platform and organizing technical workshops.
concerns: Lack of recent and extensive professional C++ and STL experience, which is the primary core competency for this role.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA), or hardware-level networking.
Missing expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards such as IEC 62443 and Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
